title: Decision on the time limit to submit observations on applications a/0163/06 to a/0187/06 for participation as victims
text: - [...] pursuant to rule 89(1) of the Rules, the Prosecution and the defence are entitled to reply to the Applications transmitted [...] with all further information; and that the information obtained pursuant to regulation 86 (4) of the Regulations is part of the applications for participation; and that therefore both the Prosecution and the OPCD shall be entitled to file observations on the Applications and on the further information; (p. 3).
